underlying_goal: Set up a way to play a specific YouTube white noise/rain video as background audio with easy start/pause controls, bypassing their brainrot website blocker
friction_detail: The socat/JSON IPC output was leaking to stdout, requiring a fix to silence it.
brief_summary: User wanted a background rain/white noise player script with toggle controls, and got a working solution after a minor fix to suppress noisy IPC output.
